# Davide & Claudia — Travel UGC Creators

> Strategic travel UGC creators producing cinematic, ready-to-use content for hotels, resorts, restaurants and lifestyle travel brands.

Davide & Claudia are a content production duo (not influencers) focused on authentic, high-quality user-generated content for the travel and hospitality industry. They deliver vertical video, photography and editorial assets designed to drive engagement and bookings for boutique hotels, luxury resorts, tourism boards and travel brands worldwide.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, portfolio of hotel and travel collaborations, partnership model, and contact information.

## Sections

- [About](/#about): Who Davide & Claudia are and their approach to strategic UGC.
- [Work](/#work): Portfolio of hotel, experience and restaurant collaborations across Maldives, Sri Lanka, Australia and more.
- [Capabilities](/#services): Deliverables — vertical video, photography, editorial content for hotels and travel brands.
- [Approach](/#why-choose-us): 3-step process — first contact, on location production, delivery.
- [Contact](/#contact): Get in touch at aroundtheworld.ugc@gmail.com or @aroundtheworld.ugc on Instagram.
